---
title: "Identificaction of Transcriptomic Features"
author: 
  - "Jaime Ñíguez"
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    formats: ipynb,Rmd  
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.11.2
  kernelspec:
    display_name: R
    language: R
    name: ir
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---


# Important genes to predict progression

```{r}

# UNIFIED VARIABLE IMPORTANCE ANALYSIS FUNCTION
analyze_variable_importance <- function(results_object, 
                                       domain_name = "Motor", 
                                       k_value = 2,
                                       additional_vars = 1000) {
  
  # Load required libraries
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  
  # Extract and prepare variable importance data
  var_imp <- results_object$VariableImportance %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    arrange(desc(Importance))
  
  # Scale to 0-100
  var_imp <- var_imp %>%
    mutate(
      Importance = 100 * (Importance - min(Importance)) / (max(Importance) - min(Importance))
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(Importance))
  
  # Calculate elbow point mathematically (curvature method)
  calculate_elbow_point <- function(var_imp) {
    importances <- var_imp$Importance
    cumulative_sum <- cumsum(importances)
    cumulative_percentage <- cumulative_sum / sum(importances)
    
    n_vars <- length(importances)
    coordinates <- cbind(1:n_vars, cumulative_percentage)
    start_point <- coordinates[1, ]
    end_point <- coordinates[n_vars, ]
    
    distances <- apply(coordinates, 1, function(point) {
      numerator <- abs((end_point[2] - start_point[2]) * point[1] - 
                        (end_point[1] - start_point[1]) * point[2] + 
                        end_point[1] * start_point[2] - end_point[2] * start_point[1])
      denominator <- sqrt((end_point[2] - start_point[2])^2 + (end_point[1] - start_point[1])^2)
      numerator / denominator
    })
    
    elbow_point <- which.max(distances)
    
    return(list(
      elbow_index = elbow_point,
      n_variables = elbow_point,
      cumulative_importance = cumulative_percentage[elbow_point]
    ))
  }
  
  # Apply curvature method
  elbow <- calculate_elbow_point(var_imp)
  
  # Create THREE datasets:
  # 1. Important variables only (above cutoff)
  important_vars <- var_imp[1:elbow$n_variables, ]
  
  # 2. Extended view for plotting (cutoff + additional_vars)
  n_show <- min(elbow$n_variables + additional_vars, nrow(var_imp))
  var_imp_filtered <- var_imp[1:n_show, ]
  
  # Create plot with selected variables
  p <- ggplot(var_imp_filtered, aes(x = Importance, y = reorder(Variable, Importance))) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.8, width = 0.7) +
    # Horizontal line for elbow point cutoff
    geom_hline(yintercept = nrow(var_imp_filtered) - elbow$n_variables + 0.5, 
               color = "red", linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5, alpha = 0.9) +
    # Annotation for elbow line
    annotate("text", 
             x = max(var_imp_filtered$Importance) * 0.7, 
             y = nrow(var_imp_filtered) - elbow$n_variables/2,
             label = paste("Cutoff point:", elbow$n_variables, "variables"), 
             color = "red", size = 4, fontface = "bold", hjust = 0) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Most Important Variables for", domain_name, "Progression Prediction"),
      subtitle = paste("Top", n_show, "variables (criteria: curvature method + next", additional_vars, "variables)"),
      x = "Relative Importance (0-100)",
      y = "Variables"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "darkred", face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
    )
  
  # Show summary
  cat("===", domain_name, "DOMAIN - SUMMARY ===\n")
  cat("Cutoff point (elbow):", elbow$n_variables, "variables\n")
  cat("Cumulative importance:", round(elbow$cumulative_importance * 100, 1), "%\n")
  cat("Important variables (above cutoff):", nrow(important_vars), "\n")
  cat("Variables shown in plot:", n_show, "\n")
  cat("Additional variables shown:", n_show - elbow$n_variables, "\n")
  cat("Total variables available:", nrow(var_imp), "\n\n")
  
  # Return results
  return(list(
    plot = p,
    important_vars = important_vars,           # Only variables above cutoff
    var_imp_filtered = var_imp_filtered,       # Extended view for plotting
    elbow_point = elbow$n_variables,
    cumulative_importance = elbow$cumulative_importance,
    top_variables = important_vars$Variable    # Only the important ones
  ))
}

# FUNCTION TO CONVERT ENSEMBL IDs TO GENE SYMBOLS
convert_ensembl_to_symbols <- function(var_imp_data, mart = NULL) {
  if (is.null(mart)) {
    library(biomaRt)
    mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")
  }
  
  ensembl_ids <- var_imp_data$Variable
  gene_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
                    filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                    values = ensembl_ids,
                    mart = mart)
  
  # Create new gene symbols
  new_genes <- sapply(ensembl_ids, function(id) {
    symbol <- gene_map$hgnc_symbol[match(id, gene_map$ensembl_gene_id)]
    ifelse(symbol != "" & !is.na(symbol), symbol, id)
  })
  
  var_imp_data$Variable <- new_genes
  var_imp_data$Gene_Symbol <- new_genes
  var_imp_data$Ensembl_ID <- ensembl_ids
  
  return(var_imp_data)
}

# ANALYZE MOTOR DOMAIN
cat("ANALYZING MOTOR DOMAIN...\n")
motor_results <- analyze_variable_importance(
  results_object = results_NoCov_Motor_k2,
  domain_name = "Motor",
  k_value = 2,
  additional_vars = 1000
)

print(motor_results$plot)

# ANALYZE NON-MOTOR DOMAIN  
cat("ANALYZING NON-MOTOR DOMAIN...\n")
non_motor_results <- analyze_variable_importance(
  results_object = results_NoCov_Non_Motor_k3,
  domain_name = "Non-Motor",
  k_value = 3,
  additional_vars = 1000
)

print(non_motor_results$plot)

# OPTIONAL: Convert Ensembl IDs to Gene Symbols (ONLY IMPORTANT VARIABLES)
cat("CONVERTING ENSEMBL IDs TO GENE SYMBOLS (IMPORTANT VARIABLES ONLY)...\n")
library(biomaRt)
ensembl_mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

# Convert only the important variables (above cutoff)
motor_important_genes <- convert_ensembl_to_symbols(motor_results$important_vars, ensembl_mart)
non_motor_important_genes <- convert_ensembl_to_symbols(non_motor_results$important_vars, ensembl_mart)

# Show top genes for each domain (ONLY IMPORTANT ONES)
cat("\n=== TOP IMPORTANT GENES - MOTOR DOMAIN ===\n")
print(head(motor_important_genes[, c("Gene_Symbol", "Importance")], 10))
cat("Total important genes in Motor domain:", nrow(motor_important_genes), "\n")

cat("\n=== TOP IMPORTANT GENES - NON-MOTOR DOMAIN ===\n")
print(head(non_motor_important_genes[, c("Gene_Symbol", "Importance")], 10))
cat("Total important genes in Non-Motor domain:", nrow(non_motor_important_genes), "\n")

# COMPARISON SUMMARY
cat("\n=== COMPARISON SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Motor Domain:\n")
cat("  - Important variables:", motor_results$elbow_point, "\n")
cat("  - Cumulative importance:", round(motor_results$cumulative_importance * 100, 1), "%\n")
cat("  - Top gene:", motor_important_genes$Gene_Symbol[1], "\n\n")

cat("Non-Motor Domain:\n")
cat("  - Important variables:", non_motor_results$elbow_point, "\n")
cat("  - Cumulative importance:", round(non_motor_results$cumulative_importance * 100, 1), "%\n")
cat("  - Top gene:", non_motor_important_genes$Gene_Symbol[1], "\n")

# Save important genes to variables for further use
VarImpMotor <- motor_important_genes$Variable
VarImpNonMotor <- non_motor_important_genes$Variable

cat("\n=== DATASET SIZES ===\n")
cat("Motor genes (important only):", length(VarImpMotor), "variables\n")
cat("Non-Motor genes (important only):", length(VarImpNonMotor), "variables\n")


```


# Differential expression analysis


```{r}

analyze_differential_expression <- function(data, 
                                          group_column, 
                                          metadata_columns = c("sample_id"), 
                                          visits = c("M0"),
                                          base_column_name = "cluster") {
  
  # Load required libraries
  if (!require(DESeq2)) install.packages("DESeq2"); library(DESeq2)
  if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr"); library(dplyr)
  if (!require(biomaRt)) install.packages("biomaRt"); library(biomaRt)
  if (!require(tibble)) install.packages("tibble"); library(tibble)
  
  # 1. Filter data for selected visits
  filtered_data <- data[data$visit_name %in% visits, ]
  
  # Ensure group column is factor
  filtered_data[[group_column]] <- factor(filtered_data[[group_column]])
  
  # 2. Extract count matrix (assuming genes start from column 4)
  countData <- t(as.matrix(filtered_data[, 4:ncol(filtered_data)]))
  countData <- as.matrix(countData)
  
  # 3. Ensembl ID to Gene Symbol translation
  ensembl <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")
  ensembl_ids <- rownames(countData)
  
  gene_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
                    filters = "ensembl_gene_id", 
                    values = ensembl_ids,
                    mart = ensembl)
  
  new_rownames <- sapply(ensembl_ids, function(id) {
    symbol <- gene_map$hgnc_symbol[match(id, gene_map$ensembl_gene_id)]
    ifelse(symbol != "" & !is.na(symbol), symbol, id)
  })
  
  rownames(countData) <- new_rownames
  countData <- as.matrix(countData)
  
  # 4. Prepare metadata for DESeq2
  group_column_clean <- gsub(paste0("^", base_column_name, "_"), "", group_column)
  metadata <- filtered_data[, c(metadata_columns, group_column)]
  colnames(metadata)[colnames(metadata) == group_column] <- "group"
  
  # 5. Create DESeqDataSet object
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = countData,
    colData = metadata,
    design = ~ group
  )
  
  # 6. Determine number of groups and execute appropriate analysis
  num_groups <- length(levels(filtered_data[[group_column]]))
  
  if (num_groups == 2) {
    # Analysis for 2 groups (like the first case)
    dds <- DESeq(dds)
    
    # Get group levels
    group_levels <- levels(filtered_data[[group_column]])
    
    # Compare group 1 vs 2
    res <- results(dds, contrast = c("group", as.character(group_levels[1]), 
                                    as.character(group_levels[2])))
    
    # Convert to data.frame and add annotations
    res_df <- as.data.frame(res) %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
      mutate(
        significant = ifelse(
          padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.5, "DEG", "No DEG"
        ),
        overexpressed_in = case_when(
          log2FoldChange > 0.5 & padj < 0.05 ~ paste("Group", group_levels[1]),
          log2FoldChange < -0.5 & padj < 0.05 ~ paste("Group", group_levels[2]), 
          TRUE ~ "None"
        ),
        comparison = paste(group_levels[1], "vs", group_levels[2]),
        cluster_type = group_column_clean
      )
    
    return(list(results = res_df, analysis_type = "2_groups"))
    
  } else if (num_groups >= 3) {
    # Analysis for 3 or more groups (like the second case)
    
    # Helper function for DESeq and results
    get_DEGs <- function(dds, group_var, contrast, label, cluster_type){
      dds_tmp <- dds
      colData(dds_tmp)$grp <- factor(colData(dds_tmp)[[group_var]])
      design(dds_tmp) <- ~ grp
      dds_tmp <- DESeq(dds_tmp)
      
      res <- results(dds_tmp, contrast = c("grp", contrast[1], contrast[2]))
      res_df <- as.data.frame(res) %>%
        rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
        mutate(
          comparison = label,
          cluster_type = cluster_type,
          significant = ifelse(!is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.5, "DEG", "No DEG"),
          overexpressed_in = case_when(
            log2FoldChange > 0.5 & padj < 0.05 ~ contrast[1],
            log2FoldChange < -0.5 & padj < 0.05 ~ contrast[2],
            TRUE ~ "None"
          )
        )
      return(res_df)
    }
    
    # Prepare combined groups for comparisons
    group_levels <- levels(filtered_data[[group_column]])
    
    # Create all possible 1 vs rest combinations
    combined_results <- list()
    
    for (i in seq_along(group_levels)) {
      current_group <- group_levels[i]
      remaining_groups <- paste(group_levels[-i], collapse = "+")
      
      # Create grouped variable
      colData(dds)[[paste0("group_", current_group, "_vs_rest")]] <- 
        ifelse(colData(dds)$group == current_group, 
               as.character(current_group), 
               remaining_groups)
      
      # Execute analysis for this comparison
      res_temp <- get_DEGs(dds, 
                          paste0("group_", current_group, "_vs_rest"), 
                          c(as.character(current_group), remaining_groups),
                          paste(current_group, "vs", remaining_groups),
                          group_column_clean)
      
      combined_results[[i]] <- res_temp
    }
    
    # Combine all results
    res_all <- bind_rows(combined_results)
    
    return(list(results = res_all, analysis_type = "multi_groups"))
    
  } else {
    stop("At least 2 groups are required for analysis")
  }
}




### Filtrado por gene_match (genes protein coding)

# We need the raw counts instead of the VST:
PPMI_raw_counts <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "1aFase_ReducirGenes", "PPMI_exp")) %>% 
  rownames_to_column(.data = ., "sample_id") %>%
  filter(sample_id %in% rownames(PPMI_exp_M0)) %>% 
  select(all_of(c("sample_id", gene_match))) 




# Para el análisis de expresion diferencial cogemos solo los genes y las etiquetas motor

genes_motor <- Covariates_clusterMotor %>%
  select(sample_id, cluster, visit_name) %>%
  inner_join(
    PPMI_raw_counts,
    by = "sample_id"
  )



genes_non_motor <- Covariates_clusterNonMotor %>%
  select(sample_id, cluster, visit_name) %>%
  inner_join(
    PPMI_raw_counts,
    by = "sample_id"
  )


# For motor analysis (2 groups)
motor_DEG_results <- analyze_differential_expression(
  data = genes_motor,
  group_column = "cluster",
  visits = c("M0")
)

# For non-motor analysis (3 groups)
non_motor_DEG_results <- analyze_differential_expression(
  data = genes_non_motor,
  group_column = "cluster", 
  visits = c("M0")
)


# Access result dataframes
motor_df_DEG <- motor_DEG_results$results %>% filter(significant == "DEG")
non_motor_df_DEG <- non_motor_DEG_results$results %>% filter(significant == "DEG")

# Summary of DEGs by comparison


```
